Nested ANOVA._note: REML/GLS value (2025): the engine now computes nested tests via REML variance components with precision-weighted (GLS) treatment means, which reproduces Prism EXACTLY on a validated unbalanced case (t=1.792, F=3.210, p=0.1477). This particular 2x2x2 case is degenerate (among-subcolumn variance estimates to ~0), so REML pools toward the within-variance and gives F=1.030; the old 5.488 was the classical MS_treat/MS_subgroup fallback and was never Prism-validated. Ideally re-validate THIS case in Prism.
